message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with latest no-mock gate validation progress

Updates bd-mblr.3.4 (No-Mock Critical-Path Enforcement Gate) with a
new comment (id 3010) recording the latest validation retry attempt
via rch on the recovered fleet. The no-mock gate CI wiring and runner
implementation remain in place; remote check executions continue to
run long without yielding reliable completion transcripts, so the bead
stays in_progress pending clean cargo check + clippy evidence capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1037,7 +1037,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","title":"CI E2E matrix workflow + artifact publishing","description":"Implement CI matrix for scenario workloads with deterministic seeds and durable artifact upload policy. Output: reproducible matrix runs with retained diagnostics.","design":"Implement matrix definition as data (manifest) plus renderer, not hand-authored duplicated YAML blocks.","acceptance_criteria":"- CI matrix generation is deterministic and traceable to canonical scenario/seed manifests.
- Artifact publishing is robust: every failure lane produces complete triage bundle with retention policy.
- Workflow output surfaces run_id/scenario_id links so investigators can jump directly to relevant evidence.","notes":"CI matrix workflow consumes the canonical orchestrator manifest (bd-mblr.4.5.2) plus artifact schema so lane definition remains deterministic and drift-resistant. Treat artifact durability as first-class; missing artifacts on failure should itself fail the job.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:38:08.647642001Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T08:48:41.295861736Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T08:48:41.295832912Z","close_reason":"Implemented deterministic CI E2E scenario matrix in verification-gates workflow (smoke/correctness/recovery lanes with fixed seeds), per-lane machine-readable summary artifacts, and durable artifact uploads (retention-days=21).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","title":"Scenario-to-script coverage drift CI gate","description":"Add CI checker that validates canonical scenario catalog coverage against script/test traceability manifests and fails when required scenarios are unmapped or unexecuted in required lanes. Output: machine-readable gap diff and human summary.","design":"Compare canonical scenario catalog against script/test traceability and executed lane manifests to detect both mapping drift and execution drift.","acceptance_criteria":"1. CI validates canonical scenario catalog coverage against script/test manifests and required execution lanes. 2. Fails when required scenarios are unmapped or not executed with required artifacts/logging. 3. Produces machine-readable gap diff and concise operator summary for remediation.","notes":"This gate consumes consolidated script-suite readiness via bd-mblr.4.5.3 and core matrix behavior via bd-mblr.3.2.1. It is intentionally decoupled from final script-log conformance gate (bd-mblr.5.5.3) so scenario-drift enforcement can be implemented earlier, with combined assurance enforced later at CI policy level.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:44:32.043386147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T08:56:28.246289547Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T08:56:28.246267496Z","close_reason":"Implemented scenario-to-script drift gate runner (machine-readable gap diff + human summary) and wired enforcement into e2e-scenario-matrix CI lanes with deterministic seeds/artifacts. Validated by local runner execution showing required gap detection.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.5.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2841,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Restored parent-child link to bd-mblr.3.2 so CI drift gate remains grouped under CI E2E gate family and appears in parent rollups/plans.","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:31:28Z"},{"id":2842,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Restored direct dependency on bd-mblr.5.5.3 so scenario coverage drift gate only activates after script logging conformance checks are in place (prevents false confidence from scenario coverage without diagnostics quality).","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:33:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.3","title":"Flake Budget, Retry Policy, and Quarantine Workflow","description":"Define explicit flake budget for unit/e2e/coverage jobs, safe retry strategy, quarantine process, and escalation path so CI gates stay reliable without masking real regressions. Output: policy + automation hooks + incident workflow.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Model flake handling as policy config + enforcement hooks so decisions are reviewable and versioned.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Flake budget is numerically defined per gate class with clear escalation thresholds. - Retry policy distinguishes infrastructure/transient failures from correctness failures and prevents masking regressions. - Quarantine workflow includes owner assignment, expiry, and mandatory follow-up issue linkage.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Flake policy is derived from observed behavior of implemented CI gates (bd-mblr.3.1.1, bd-mblr.3.1.2, bd-mblr.3.2.1, bd-mblr.3.2.2, bd-mblr.3.4.1). Policy intentionally follows gate implementation; redundant parent blockers are removed where transitive prerequisites already enforce order.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:24:47.984613898Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:11.550981833Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","title":"No-mock critical-path CI gate rule","description":"Enforce CI rule that critical-path verification must be satisfied by real-backend tests, not mock-only suites. Output: auditable rule implementation and failure messaging.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Implement rule over structured invariant/test mapping generated from bd-mblr.1.3.2 artifacts.","acceptance_criteria":"1. CI rule evaluates non-mock critical-path evidence with deterministic pass/fail semantics. - Rule emits precise failure diagnostics (missing path, expected proving tests, observed evidence). - Rule supports controlled, expiring exceptions with explicit owner metadata.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Unparented to unblock critical-path CI gate implementation; no reduction in no-mock enforcement requirements.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:38:08.898484590Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741586999Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741565359Z","close_reason":"Implemented no-mock critical-path CI gate in no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs. 9 tests passing. Unblocks bd-mblr.3.5.1, bd-mblr.3.5, bd-mblr.3.3.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3003,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-mblr.3.4.1 Completion — No-Mock Critical-Path CI Gate Rule

### Implementation

Created `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs` implementing the blocking CI gate rule that enforces non-mock evidence for critical-path invariants.

### Architecture

The gate cross-references the UnitMatrix with the NoMockEvidenceMap to ensure every invariant in a critical category has at least one non-mock evidence entry.

**Critical Categories** (blocking): SqlGrammar, VdbeOpcodes, StorageTransaction

**Verdict logic:**
- `PASS` — all critical invariants have real evidence
- `FAIL` — one or more critical invariants have no evidence (blocking)
- `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` — all covered but some via exceptions only

### Evidence: 9 unit tests passing

All quality gates green: cargo check, clippy, fmt.
","created_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5","title":"Unified quality evidence rollup and release-readiness gate","description":"Aggregate outputs from coverage/no-mock/unit/e2e/logging gates into a single deterministic release-readiness decision artifact so users can trust that the implementation is fully validated before merge/release.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Program outputs one deterministic release-readiness decision per CI run with pass/fail per required gate family (coverage, no-mock unit, e2e scenario coverage, logging conformance, flake policy). 2. Decision artifact links to machine-readable evidence + human summary and is suitable for automated policy checks. 3. Gate fails closed when required evidence is missing, stale, or contradictory.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:16.460888968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:10.685386012Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2843,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added to improve user trust and operator ergonomics: implementation can be technically complete but still hard to evaluate quickly. This bead creates a single source of truth proving that comprehensive unit/e2e/logging gates all passed with auditable evidence.","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:36Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","title":"Machine-readable validation manifest (coverage + unit + e2e + logging)","description":"Emit one normalized evidence manifest that records gate outcomes, invariant drift status, scenario coverage status, logging conformance status, and artifact references for every required lane.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Manifest schema is versioned and machine-readable, including gate IDs, outcome, timestamp, commit SHA, and artifact URIs. 2. Manifest captures invariant drift, scenario coverage drift, no-mock critical-path status, and logging conformance status. 3. Manifest generation is deterministic and reproducible across reruns for same inputs. 4. Unit and property tests validate schema evolution, required-field enforcement, deterministic ordering, and backward-incompatible change detection. 5. A deterministic e2e scenario script generates the manifest from real CI artifacts and verifies replayability with exact repro commands. 6. Structured logging emits trace_id/run_id/scenario_id, timing, and artifact linkage, and CI enforces logging-schema conformance for manifest generation.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseTiger","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:22.911916746Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T05:55:50.999776766Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3004,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"RoseTiger","text":"Implemented manifest determinism cleanup in crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs: removed duplicate log/profile validation calls and replaced collect-based aggregate outcome paths with iterator-based aggregation to satisfy strict clippy/pedantic linting. Running rch-based cargo gates now; remote worker scheduling has been unstable so verification is still in progress.","created_at":"2026-02-15T05:55:50Z"}]}
